The only thing standing in their way is you, Peter.
| Hello, Peter! You are receiving this email because you signed up to receive emails that help elect Republicans. To update your email preferences, [click here](http://go.electrepublicans.org/email-pause-hcyg3zodnis23eo5gx58?e=1a1fe10c9303676f5a8934f3586944e0&utm_source=electrepublicans&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=anz_p&n=1).

But despite everything, they failed -- thanks to the hard work of millions of Grassroots Republicans like you. Now, Joe Biden, Chuch Schumer, and the Democrats have a new target: Georgia’s two Runoff Elections, scheduled for January 5th. If they win in Georgia, they’ll seize total control in Washington, DC. We can’t let that happen, Peter. To stop them, we need to raise $14,491 by midnight tonight so we can fund the critical Get Out The Vote efforts it’ll take to win. **[Your donation could be the one that puts us over the top. Can we count on you to chip in $5 or more right away?](https://www.electrepublicans.org/r?u=K115QJUsYIJk1EqYiO2oYkhf8Ah1OEOdLEYEQfbD4X3l0akU69vlcPG9kxPVllSoyXSZrHRjGthuTT8Y9eiKdaKkuGB218MfpwalHwD_tOBEG_g3ur3jDh2_F-WxrcVE4993Qsdwa-gs7yDV5CRYwYy63zEbEXJmPoAxzeZjGHTzVi14P61XHmUpBfIre4pfuOgUJTIGrtFG_g1PYNvGWV3U7LFolVzSwHqscAyzD4dxAiGsrNKMRQ6hSZEGM-mV6XkuhVCls4SJLSfCLj5tTuOy8IfZZ-Cg-uFyLO2T_HpP-euRJA8tGbNxbYdA7-bPQk6CBiN7nMZ_06G5MMfmzl6Ir9dyQLTtTf6LHflEVfbB4u9Jukac4h-Cs6wHFdhmH4vUv0uFQtXjLWHqM2FIqjM0iBNf5eG3zdps4Ik0EFHWGSJSrUx5InWVDsPjsdzzCKF1nzmIQW-MdNyFk3Y1nF8pFez7P8i7Egs2WjCu2mwofPQHcZEdYHPhOwgLsbyD&e=1a1fe10c9303676f5a8934f3586944e0&utm_source=electrepublicans&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=anz_p&n=3)** _If you've saved your payment information with WinRed, your donation will go through immediately._ | | | [Donate $5](https://www.electrepublicans.org/r?u=K115QJUsYIJk1EqYiO2oYkhf8Ah1OEOdLEYEQfbD4X3l0akU69vlcPG9kxPVllSoyXSZrHRjGthuTT8Y9eiKdaKkuGB218MfpwalHwD_tOBEG_g3ur3jDh2_F-WxrcVE4993Qsdwa-gs7yDV5CRYwe-reV4ZZflbh2L_sIQehw1UNqVO0Ca7F3UQVT803u6VpCo0P3on2hk81CZbDrPD2_7PpX_RZX59fiS4Te3iC1qUcxKQXEs1z-yMAkanmc0zd4A8NS-7FxCUvvmlhpEF6oBRvRm-g1HvBaYl6UNgNL5ROKBaerx1UG271bSLnUWFhQ_BQHv3BI9srEx8sQ3vJLevPqvUJgEW-ca2ayL7Af5_KQVd7ti9xIkCSrJnUgDJUdXs1L82GCJ0pAhOH1wc8b-HtKarw6Lw6amG7dImJaSaspZ-_aj5MQzTxKma05qS4igj1dJ4nQ2cl78RepMInVreoE_y0KOSwER-gavBoa-g5bwp8ApdhQtPvV3M4ZeAzjRWjbjxsymFx3nKpAxSgw&e=1a1fe10c9303676f5a8934f3586944e0&utm_source=electrepublicans&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=anz_p&n=4)

If the Democrats win in Georgia, there’ll be nothing to stop them from undoing everything we have achieved with President Trump.
They’d use the next two years to pass all of their radical, far-left policies. We have to stop them here and now. Georgia is our firewall against socialism.
**So please, Peter, make a donation of $5 or more right away. We can’t win this fight without your support.**
**[https://secure.winred.com/electrepublicans/georgia](https://www.electrepublicans.org/r?u=K115QJUsYIJk1EqYiO2oYkhf8Ah1OEOdLEYEQfbD4X3l0akU69vlcPG9kxPVllSoyXSZrHRjGthuTT8Y9eiKdaKkuGB218MfpwalHwD_tOBEG_g3ur3jDh2_F-WxrcVE4993Qsdwa-gs7yDV5CRYwYy63zEbEXJmPoAxzeZjGHTzVi14P61XHmUpBfIre4pfuOgUJTIGrtFG_g1PYNvGWV3U7LFolVzSwHqscAyzD4ePqzVmBLWPEOmHFYxr8yFwOlCTw4RrNnDwcAyMHaV77uB5mpfJYo-0DT_bJFARrkxxyFFvogTrGzeDFZ6gopzNFgEd9qlKglqd5ziZiwkICrxF70XjNR37YzDd_6jmYEg1zDueaIVK-GtVa5rz-b3XQalyNm5jTJFhCBHUjXZpbHrrvzskVDS0tp8cXcp5686nXGk2TTkK19Ewzvj3UFob8usjfSemS83eZYGES-mo1SxhQMcWdljQHvdIco2nIuwsHlm8xQOwnVbLpn_JMnjg&e=1a1fe10c9303676f5a8934f3586944e0&utm_source=electrepublicans&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=anz_p&n=10)**

_Elect Republicans (FEC ID #C00747170)
9648 Olive Blvd, Suite 300, St Louis, MO 63132, United States _

Emails like this are an essential part of our campaign, Peter! If we got your name or any information wrong, we apologize. If you would like to receive fewer emails, [click here](http://go.electrepublicans.org/email-pause-hcyg3zodnis23eo5gx58?e=1a1fe10c9303676f5a8934f3586944e0&utm_source=electrepublicans&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=anz_p&n=14). If you would like to unsubscribe, [click here](https://www.electrepublicans.org/unsubscribe?e=1a1fe10c9303676f5a8934f3586944e0&utm_source=electrepublicans&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=anz_p&n=15). But keep in mind that if you leave, it will be harder for you to stay engaged with the Republican campaigns that you support.

Please send a personal check made payable to “Elect Republicans” to the address above to contribute by mail. Be sure to provide your full name, mailing address, email address, occupation, and employer with your mailed contribution.

Contributions to Elect Republicans are not tax-deductible for federal income tax purposes and will be used in connection with federal elections.

Federal law requires Elect Republicans to use its best efforts to collect and report the name, mailing address, occupation, and name of employer of individuals whose contributions exceed $200 in a calendar year.

Contributions from individuals to Elect Republicans of up to $5,000 per year are designated to the Elect Republicans candidate contribution account. Any amount over $5,000 per year is designated to the Elect Republicans Carey account.

The use of the name and likeness of any candidate or officeholder by Elect Republicans is for Elect Republicans’ political communication only. IN NO WAY does it indicate any authorization by, affiliation with, direction from, or endorsement by that person of any kind.

By subscribing to our emails, you agree to our [Privacy Policy](http://www.electrepublicans.org/privacy?e=1a1fe10c9303676f5a8934f3586944e0&utm_source=electrepublicans&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=anz_p&n=16).

name: Bo Snerdley
subject: AOC Is Doing “Everything” to win Georgia
disclaimer_text: Paid for by New Journey PAC
body:
[](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/56355919:JLW22gbNS:m:1:3206719985:26DB5A0AA47BC347C14B807F0E145BE5:r "AOC") Peter: She said it, and we can't ignore it. AOC confirmed what we all suspected - if they win the Senate races in Georgia, they will COMPLETELY cut Republicans out of any legislation to promote the most radically progressive agenda our nation will ever see. The agenda for Biden's first 100 days includes:
* A national mask mandate,
* A National Lockdown,
* Reparations for Slavery,
* The Green New Deal,
* Open Borders, and
* Repealing Your 2nd Amendment Rights

This is how America becomes a socialist nation. That is why New Journey PAC is fighting with everything we can to elect Kelly Loeffler and David Perdue. If they lose, Chuck Schumer gains control of the U.S. Senate, and nothing stands in the way of our slide towards socialism. **[Will you make a $45 donation to help us win and prevent AOC and Nancy Pelosi from helping Joe Biden pass a socialist agenda in Congress next year?](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/56355920:JLW22gbNS:m:1:3206719985:26DB5A0AA47BC347C14B807F0E145BE5:r "Will you make a $45 donation to help us win and
prevent AOC and Nancy Pelosi from helping Joe Biden pass a socialist agenda in Congress next year?")** My name is James Golden, but you may know me better as Bo Snerdley - producer and call screener for the one and only Rush Limbaugh. I started the New Journey PAC to help Black Republican candidates across the country. We saw a flood of successful candidates this year. Now, we have shifted our focus to Georgia - I cannot stress enough how critical these runoff races are to the future of our nation. If we lose here, we have no power in Washington, and AOC knows it. We are also in the middle of a full hand recount in President Trump's race. **[She is fighting, but we have to fight harder.](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/56355919:JLW22gbNS:m:1:3206719985:26DB5A0AA47BC347C14B807F0E145BE5:r "She is fighting, but we have to fight harder.")** | | [FIGHT SOCIALISM - DONATE TODAY](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/56355919:JLW22gbNS:m:1:3206719985:26DB5A0AA47BC347C14B807F0E145BE5:r "FIGHT SOCIALISM - DONATE TODAY")
---
I have watched AOC since she got to Congress - riding on a wave of Twitter popularity and bad ideas that lead to her $17 Million in fundraising since she became a candidate. As soon as she got to DC, she unveiled her horrendous Green New Deal - outlawing cows and handing out taxpayer money to anyone who didn't "feel" like working.
We will do whatever it takes - we are running digital ads, we are producing TV ads, we are staffing the call centers, we are waving signs and we are watching the recount closely.
**We have people on the ground who need your support and[Your donation of $1,000, $500, $205 $100, even just $45 could make all the difference.](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/56355920:JLW22gbNS:m:1:3206719985:26DB5A0AA47BC347C14B807F0E145BE5:r "Your donation of $1,000, $500, $205 $100, even just $45 could
make all the difference.")**
The outcome of the upcoming special election will determine our future--freedom or socialism. Will you do all you can to help us preserve freedom in America?
For a New Journey,
[](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/56355919:JLW22gbNS:m:1:3206719985:26DB5A0AA47BC347C14B807F0E145BE5:r "James Golden, AKA Bo Snerdley")
James Golden, AKA Bo Snerdley
Founder, New Journey PAC
| **Paid for by New Journey PAC
Not Authorized by Any Candidate or Candidate's Committee**

| View the transcript below for highlights from the interview:
SANDRA SMITH: These races have been billed by your party as a battle for the control of the nation, Senator. What would it mean for the country if you were to lose these two senate seats?
SENATOR LOEFFLER: Well, obviously everything is on the line. We're the firewall against socialism in this country. Chuck Schumer said "now we take Georgia, then we change America." And that's exactly what he means. We know he would abolish the filibuster, pack the court, implement a dramatic tax increase on all hard working families across America - and he has his own agent of change in Warnock, running against me and my race - the most radically liberal candidate for senate in the country. Don't take my word for it. It is in his own words. He is someone that doesn't support the police. He said that you can't serve in the military and serve god. He celebrated Fidel Castro in his own church. So this is the type of candidate, the type of agenda, that Democrats want to enact if we don't hold the line in Georgia on January 5th.
SANDRA SMITH: You are running against socialism. You've made that very clear, if you and Perdue win you are saving the country. What are you running on?
SENATOR LOEFFLER: Important question, Sandra, because what we're running on is the American Dream, economic opportunity that lifts all Americans up. This isn't about Republicans and Democrats right now. This is about the American dream or socialism. That's what is at stake. Look, I lived the American Dream. I was born and raised on a farm. I went from a farm to the Fortune 500 and created hundreds of jobs in Georgia - and I want for Georgia, the opportunity to live their dream and the freedom and opportunities that all Americans deserve. And look, I want to reopen our economy as well. I want to make sure we get relief to hard working Americans. Democrats want to shut down the economy and blocked relief over and over. We'll hold them accountable on January 5.

name: Senate Conservatives
subject: Save Georgia, Save America
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY SENATE CONSERVATIVES FUND AND NOT
body:
The Democrats are planning to push through a crushing list of
socialist policies if they get control of the White House, the
House of Representatives, and THE SENATE!

Fellow American:

The Democrats are planning to push through a
crushing list of socialist policies if they get control of the
White House, the House of Representatives, and THE SENATE!

To start, they're going to cancel over $1.6 billion
in student loans as if there's a Money Fairy that can just make
it all disappear without transferring those costs onto the backs
of hardworking Americans.

And the liberal governors who have destroyed their
state economies with lockdowns want to force taxpayers in other
states to pay their bills with a multi-trillion-dollar federal
bailout.

This is why we must win the TWO RUNOFF ELECTIONS in
Georgia and save the United States Senate!

Please help us push Senators David Perdue and Kelly
Loeffler on to victory by making a generous contribution today!

Unchecked socialism will do lasting damage to our
great country that will be near impossible to fix.

We must create a FIREWALL FOR FREEDOM in the Senate,
and that starts with winning the Georgia runoffs.

These two elections will be won or lost on turnout.
The side that works the hardest to get their core supporters to
vote wins. It's that simple.

Please help us raise the support Senators Perdue and
Loeffler need to win their races, and to send a message!

We don't want socialism, and we're going to fight
these destructive policies and the politicians who promote them,
every step of the way. We love freedom, and we will never stop
fighting for it!

Thank you for considering this urgent request and
for doing so much to help fight for America's future.

Sincerely,

Mary Vought
Executive Director
Senate Conservatives Fund

RUNOFF COUNTDOWN

SUPPORT THESE CANDIDATES TODAY

SAVE THE SENATE

Senate Conservatives Fund300 Independence Ave
SEWashington, DC 20003

Senate Conservatives Fund is a grassroots
organization that promotes conservative policies and helps elect
conservative candidates to the U.S. Senate. SCF was founded by
former Senator Jim DeMint to help the grassroots change
Washington.

Contributions to the Senate Conservatives Fund are
not deductible as charitable contributions. Contributions from
corporations or foreign nationals lacking permanent resident
status are not permitted. Federal law requires us to report the
name, mailing address, occupation and employer for each
individual whose contributions aggregate in excess of $200 in a
calendar year. Not paid for at taxpayer expense.

PAID FOR BY SENATE CONSERVATIVES FUND AND NOT
AUTHORIZED BY ANY CANDIDATE OR CANDIDATE'S COMMITTEE.

name: Mike Thompson
subject: protect yourself and your family this holiday season
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Mike Thompson For Congress [unsubscribe](https://email
body:
|
---
| | Peter,

We’ve been socially distancing ourselves for many months now and with the holidays right around the corner, it is imperative we continue to do our part to help suppress the Coronavirus.

Recently, cases have been increasing throughout our district and the United States. While this news can feel scary, it’s important that we continue to take necessary precautions to prevent the spread of the Coronavirus. The CDC has a detailed list of recommendations that everyone can follow to stay healthy. [**_Click here for best practices on how you can protect your family and your health._**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/21646797/261607147/1030256748?CDC_AA_refVal=https%3A%2F%2Fwww.cdc.gov%2Fcoronavirus%2F2019-ncov%2Fprepare%2Findex.html&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84NDQ0OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwM2I3M2Y0Yi1jMjI5LWViMTEtOWZiNC0wMDE1NWQwM2FmZmMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=l5LogaMZzbOX240sofk7G2NCFL759wP04yvDtxrzxBk=&emci=98120cfe-b729-eb11-9fb4-00155d03affc&emdi=03b73f4b-c229-eb11-9fb4-00155d03affc&ceid=2678920)

I will continue to work on this every day to ensure that we can all return to our normal lives. Please continue to stay home, wear a mask, wash your hands and practice social distancing. Your efforts will continue to save lives and I know we will get through this together.

Thank you,

Mike Thompson

name: YouTube
subject: Changes to YouTube's Terms of Service
body:
| | |
---

You're receiving this email because we're updating the YouTube [Terms of Service](https://www.google.com/appserve/mkt/p/AD-FnEwuo7Y_kVUhedTUnU1PQFzxOSkdBleSAbWrZ81wVeHqse-w_BM4nvKNrcaiFlqdP7nfylUAxMg8jkQr9fnxXPphTnulkeok_N6BiX3xQDcn9okwWw) ("Terms") to clarify our terms and provide transparency to our users. These changes shouldn't significantly alter your access or use of the YouTube service.

A summary of the changes:
* **Facial recognition restrictions:** The Terms of Service already state that you cannot collect any information that might identify a person without their permission. While this has always included facial recognition information, the new Terms make that explicitly clear.
* **YouTube's right to monetize:** YouTube has the right to monetize all content on the platform and ads may appear on videos from channels not in the YouTube Partner Program.
* **Royalty payments and tax withholding:** For creators entitled to revenue payments, such payments will be treated as royalties from a U.S. tax perspective and Google will withhold taxes where required by law.

**Please make sure you read the updated[**Terms**](https://www.google.com/appserve/mkt/p/AD-FnEyBO0YN_PaHMmIFseWSvcVIZItUk-6dv8j3lfMQdkpIfY2aP-FgXG4BCm4Op12JY_iWj2YWdLmeHe__RCGCITcsnloe8SjMpIvos8hdtsSMQ8DbxZfRKA) carefully. The new Terms will take effect on 18 November, 2020 for users in the U.S., and similar changes to our Terms of Service will be made outside the U.S. in 2021.** By continuing to use YouTube after this date, you are agreeing to the new Terms. If you would like more information, visit our [Help Center](https://www.google.com/appserve/mkt/p/AD-FnEzaHADuPaoPmu5Ng5MQbjv0x50cFtP4bwwte24wl7Al6VN9YCobx_OYKnx9IH4G4dm68bK2FPV7rsWuGbtoiPPToflPVVRTvxLcNGgg8us8p3W3I3TMb6Al7uxAs0Y4snQqgZedLa4iVg).

Please note, if you allow your child to use YouTube Kids, then you are agreeing to the new Terms on behalf of your child as well.

You received this mandatory email service announcement to update you about important changes to the YouTube Terms.

(C) 2020 Google LLC d/b/a YouTube, 901 Cherry Ave, San Bruno, CA 94066
| | |
---|---|---

name: =?utf-8?Q?House=20Freedom=20Fund?=
subject: Final House Election Results
disclaimer_text: Paid for by House Freedom Fund
body:
We're proud to announce several more conservative victories. | | | | |
---
Can't read this? [Click here.](https://mailchi.mp/housefreedomfund/house-election-results-1383642?e=b2c16e6198)
---
| | | |
---
| | | | Peter,
Now that all of our races have been decided, we wanted to update you on the final results.

Of the 48 candidates that the House Freedom Fund supported in the general election, 40 were elected and only 8 were defeated.

Our 40th and final victory of the cycle came from Burgess Owens in Utah's 4th District, and we couldn't be more excited. We know he will be a strong voice for freedom in Washington.

[**You can see HFF's final election results here.**](https://HouseFreedomFund.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=aefad1d6b0163789c70b59bf1&id=1e44b82ec1&e=b2c16e6198)
---
| Thanks to your generous support, House Freedom Fund and our super PAC, House Freedom Action, invested over $16.5 million directly into candidates this election cycle.

Your contributions helped our candidates overcome the Left's attacks, which were funded by a "green wave" of liberal donations.

The House Freedom Caucus will be bigger and stronger next year, and we're well-positioned to help conservatives flip the House in the midterm elections.

Thank you for being part of our team and for doing so much to help us elect courageous conservatives to Congress.

Sincerely,

Ray Yonkura
House Freedom Fund

---
| | | |
House Freedom Fund
300 Independence Ave SE
Washington, DC 20003
House Freedom Fund (HFF) is a political action committee that helps elect conservative candidates to the U.S. House of Representatives. HFF only supports candidates who are dedicated to open, accountable, and limited government, and who support policies that promote the liberty, safety, and prosperity for all Americans. HFF is the only group in America exclusively dedicated to defending and expanding the House Freedom Caucus.
Paid for by House Freedom Fund. Not paid for at taxpayer expense. Contributions to House Freedom Fund are not deductible as charitable contributions. Contributions from corporations or foreign nationals lacking permanent resident status are not permitted. body:
Election season isn’t over — two of the most important races in the entire country haven’t been decided yet. [ ](http://links.email.nancymace.org/u/click?_t=b7e0c98b86c6435ea03767402a51b3fc&_m=377be5fa8eb04990846c4b6040ec95d6&_e=4OAMSm2Nsma5nYFCM_H5YYk_hZIH-r1Qq6IfJPYgcZ2koJy9-OmtrNEQ--q6DeMXe1zjkhCf8Wa-dAqYIP9y9KT7Gjkl1hPmdi6f8kLUs5U4I7SeL8_z8WbdYysRU9rnnpgzA4Bc0Ad-2u0RsA32RyD4_tNi6_-I0BKwcXd6drk_8o3w-3wT0-Kn94d2CM7MNHsCr7aLBnkOSAfTgQ46SVX-ekWhIa6CT8BmjbEKmgIAmnzgoG3mJbp_aR8h9toXAywvDEhbIcI1ip3utrDZeXI943J7CSWD6NtEBlNpdlwdSxwBon2ez8E-V6RWhrET7PPxlDYXtgqitCgepuZHYNL_lcliXfwUT1463biGs908lGIkl5VfKxy7c2OJt8hxIvPT3mrK_ajAD2_T1hDHTHF6U-NmdlXoSwJToKFsN2yqXFQHpdgOrg9ak3gJWOEiFXvCBSoVwm3Vwty0BEqehQ0TdX01WAYO419i8rStR70%3D) Friend, **Election season isn’t over — two of the most important races in the entire country haven’t been decided yet. **
And, friend, the winners of these races will determine who controls the Senate. We cannot let it slip into Democratic hands, and that means we need to hold the line in Georgia.
**[>>RUSH A SPLIT DONATION TO SENATORS KELLY LOEFFLER AND DAVID PERDUE<<](http://links.email.nancymace.org/u/click?_t=b7e0c98b86c6435ea03767402a51b3fc&_m=377be5fa8eb04990846c4b6040ec95d6&_e=4OAMSm2Nsma5nYFCM_H5YYk_hZIH-r1Qq6IfJPYgcZ2koJy9-OmtrNEQ--q6DeMXe1zjkhCf8Wa-dAqYIP9y9KT7Gjkl1hPmdi6f8kLUs5U4I7SeL8_z8WbdYysRU9rnnpgzA4Bc0Ad-2u0RsA32RyD4_tNi6_-I0BKwcXd6drk_8o3w-3wT0-Kn94d2CM7MNHsCr7aLBnkOSAfTgQ46SVX-ekWhIa6CT8BmjbEKmgIAmnzgoG3mJbp_aR8h9toXAywvDEhbIcI1ip3utrDZefl0x6MqRdrYI159RVHcHRlpGAmVx8MvgL3IvWQQRRp8qljI-E7m1C2XJTH2GJBnm02Hfb4yVpz1wSbkv21Gbb24eHl5z9mXP2QlnP1Bv23Xh1s8hWydsD3UkrebCE3nXDWVskp2-h-ITtRFmYcBRuhm769pZNXaZ5CyXjtK1krmYaBNkJ8mxcUH-gzRb5koAjuCykKzdA42pAZA1-7eri8%3D)**
_Defending the GOP Senate Majority is absolutely critical. It’s the last firewall against the left’s destructive, radical agenda. _
**The Green New Deal, socialized medicine, cutting funding to law enforcement agencies across the country — everything and the kitchen sink is on the table if we don’t hold the line Georgia. **
Democrats from all across the country are already pouring millions and millions of dollars into Georgia. They know that their socialist wishlist will never become a reality as long as Republicans hold the Senate, and they are doing everything they can to turn these seats blue.
Conservatives across the country need to step up and help push back on this liberal spending spree if they want to hold the Senate.
_**[That’s why we are reaching out right now — will you help Senators Loeffler and Perdue hold the line in Georgia and defend the GOP Senate Majority?](http://links.email.nancymace.org/u/click?_t=b7e0c98b86c6435ea03767402a51b3fc&_m=377be5fa8eb04990846c4b6040ec95d6&_e=4OAMSm2Nsma5nYFCM_H5YYk_hZIH-r1Qq6IfJPYgcZ2koJy9-OmtrNEQ--q6DeMXe1zjkhCf8Wa-dAqYIP9y9KT7Gjkl1hPmdi6f8kLUs5U4I7SeL8_z8WbdYysRU9rnnpgzA4Bc0Ad-2u0RsA32RyD4_tNi6_-I0BKwcXd6drk_8o3w-3wT0-Kn94d2CM7MNHsCr7aLBnkOSAfTgQ46SVX-ekWhIa6CT8BmjbEKmgIAmnzgoG3mJbp_aR8h9toXAywvDEhbIcI1ip3utrDZeUOdp2lgonWxS_-ovXPyKGznB5tQkXIgzaCuf3xU2weh3zV1x-EIAz9REKQsE_DMb5YZqd6BScJXN94eMzxQQyUA590_D_Wn7l-9iJ4kHj6DPE9g_EWqz-2evkerzPDjkyrX9RKTS82FYnp3YhP-GhOabua8XKlp4ed5N6yJc6kk6uZoBlZmNGji7qXTkKrCgy-j87PaKmPRFo3SU6avt7k%3D)**_
**[>>RUSH A SPLIT DONATION TO SENATORS KELLY LOEFFLER AND DAVID PERDUE<<](http://links.email.nancymace.org/u/click?_t=b7e0c98b86c6435ea03767402a51b3fc&_m=377be5fa8eb04990846c4b6040ec95d6&_e=4OAMSm2Nsma5nYFCM_H5YYk_hZIH-r1Qq6IfJPYgcZ2koJy9-OmtrNEQ--q6DeMXe1zjkhCf8Wa-dAqYIP9y9KT7Gjkl1hPmdi6f8kLUs5U4I7SeL8_z8WbdYysRU9rnnpgzA4Bc0Ad-2u0RsA32RyD4_tNi6_-I0BKwcXd6drk_8o3w-3wT0-Kn94d2CM7MNHsCr7aLBnkOSAfTgQ46SVX-ekWhIa6CT8BmjbEKmgIAmnzgoG3mJbp_aR8h9toXAywvDEhbIcI1ip3utrDZeY46ggOxPHvoySqniztDiNQYfZx3blsRUQfCy8iPvE7qAzkgHjA-TXyVSix_OjyHdUCF9u4Ebe8jPE_DYM97WlszQtohedMRPTbu7zLialRRxXRJ3_l210zhRY_gwpM4cgYXc1Y5nh0j-z1cUmjPi4jrDAsuHgoL6gfUTM6VRKMmsCZZCnkC5B1t57Yd2fzaMzcJvpH0TqH_B3v0sVOe2yU%3D)**
Thank you for helping us defend the Senate.

Team Mace |

name: =?utf-8?B?TGluZGEgU8OhbmNoZXo=?=
subject: Dear President Trump 🖊️
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Stand with Sánchez
body:
[](https://act.myngp.com/el/WqJYZXrxhcTsipN5Oo9nT-W7Aa7TMYRio15WUFBIHSA=/I0LckMoLJlUnYLVCFedNHQiAKs7QK0q_ZgecauPrEow=)
When Hillary Clinton lost the Presidential election in 2016, she conceded the next day.
[**✎ SIGN ON IN SUPPORT OF MY LETTER TO PRESIDENT TRUMP ✎**](https://act.myngp.com/el/WqJYZXrxhcTsipN5Oo9nT-W7Aa7TMYRio15WUFBIHSA=/Zx9mYIWq2YVpbjVVmVrCdEDdlQ63MSp1fA3cld6OZJ0=)
**[](https://act.myngp.com/el/WqJYZXrxhcTsipN5Oo9nT-W7Aa7TMYRio15WUFBIHSA=/4ItLsr4AgBtLOuRycqiCwk7zvjYdIbOiJCADbIbIpPs=)**
* * *
Dear President Trump,
When Hillary Clinton lost the Presidential election in 2016, she conceded the next day. _Why? _Because -- despite winning the popular vote by over _3 million_ votes -- she respected our nation's electoral process.
It's been over two weeks since the American people chose Joe Biden as the next President of the United States, but you have yet to concede.
Instead, you are pushing unfounded stories of election fraud and sowing distrust in the same electoral process that made you POTUS just four years ago. None of this is surprising of course, given your track record of pushing fake -- _even dangerous_ \-- information.
Over 79 million people are demanding you concede to the next President of the United States, Joe Biden. The American people have made their voices heard; now, you must respect their choice.
Sincerely,
_\-- Linda S anchez_

clean_body: = When Hillary Clinton lost the Presidential election in 2016, she conceded the next day. = = Dear President Trump, When Hillary Clinton lost the Presidential election in 2016, she conceded the next day. Why? Because -- despite winning the popular vote by over 3 million votes -- she respected our nation's electoral process. It's been over two weeks since the American people chose Joe Biden as the next President of the United States, but you have yet to concede. Instead, you are pushing unfounded stories of election fraud and sowing distrust in the same electoral process that made you POTUS just four years ago. None of this is surprising of course, given your track record of pushing fake -- even dangerous \-- information. Over 79 million people are demanding you concede to the next President of the United States, Joe Biden. The American people have made their voices heard; now, you must respect their choice. Friend,
Georgia election officials can begin mailing absentee ballots TODAY — and Republicans in government and their right-wing media ecosystem are dialed in and determined to do whatever it takes to prevent a Democratic Senate majority in January.
**First, **David Perdue and Kelly Loeffler demanded that their fellow Republican and Georgia Secretary of State Brad Raffensperger resign for counting all the votes in the November election.
**Then,** Lindsey Graham personally called Raffensperger asking him to throw out legally cast ballots.
**Now,** right-wing conspiracy theorists like Infowars' Alex Jones are descending on the State Capitol while social media sites allow their misinformation to spread like wildfire.
If that wasn't enough, Republican senators are attacking Reverend Raphael Warnock's faith. Warnock is the senior pastor of Ebenezer Baptist Church in Atlanta, and preaches at the same pulpit from which Dr. Martin Luther King delivered his sermons.
**We will not tolerate Republican attacks on the right to vote or the right to practice religion freely. **
[**_Georgia voters can request their absentee ballots RIGHT NOW, but we need to reach them first. That's why we need you to chip $20 in TODAY to help us get the word out. Can we count on your donation?_**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/21653964/261635929/-1328876110?refcode=em111820-PM-a&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNi8xLzg1OTY2IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImM5NzJjMDliLWU0MjktZWIxMS05ZmI0LTAwMTU1ZDAzYWZmYyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=dcCnJ0TiisfijXytJZvSzg-6wXBEFoKCW1YOvh8-cw0=)

name: Tom Fitton
subject: We get results!
body:
Regardless of what happens over the coming days and weeks with the election results, our commitment to keeping our elections honest is more important than ever, because the Left will continue attempting to corrupt, degrade and abolish our laws designed to protect ballot integrity.

| |
---
|
---
|
---
| Dear Fellow American,

I believe that you are committed to the rule of law and for accountability for elected politicians and other public officials. And that's why I hope you will make **_[your best tax-deductible donation today to Judicial Watch](https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/wta/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=52072&L=17813&F=H&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvZG9uYXRlL3RoYW5rLXlvdS0xMzUvP3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9ZGVwbG95ZXImdXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249TWF5JnV0bV90ZXJtPU5vbi1Eb25vcnMmdXRtX2NvbnRlbnQ9MjAyMDExMTgxNjU3Mzg=)_** because:
* Regardless of what happens over the coming days and weeks with the election results, **_our commitment to keeping our elections honest is more important than ever_** , _because the Left will continue attempting to corrupt, degrade and abolish our laws designed to protect ballot integrity_.

* Our courtroom battles over **illegal sanctuary policies** are also important, _especially as we prepare to go to trial in our historic challenge to San Francisco 's deadly sanctuary policy_.

* There is still justice to be served for the many continuing **Hillary Clinton** and other **Obama** era scandals, including those related to **Joe Biden**.

* **Judicial Watch** is committed to exposing _the truth_ behind the **Deep State** conspiracy to unlawfully remove President Trump from office... _a conspiracy that includes members of the liberal media, corrupt politicians and many equally corrupt senior federal government officials_!

**_[Your tax-deductible contribution to Judicial Watch now](https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/wta/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=52072&L=17813&F=H&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvZG9uYXRlL3RoYW5rLXlvdS0xMzUvP3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9ZGVwbG95ZXImdXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249TWF5JnV0bV90ZXJtPU5vbi1Eb25vcnMmdXRtX2NvbnRlbnQ9MjAyMDExMTgxNjU3Mzg=)_** will help us push forward with _all_ our lawsuits, research and investigations in these critical areas and allows us to take on new cases as they arise.
And, as I'm certain you know...when **Judicial Watch** sets out on a direction, we get results.
_Results_ like pushing states across the country to clean their voter rolls to reduce the opportunities for voter fraud. _Results_ like successfully challenging unlawful "sanctuary" policies for illegal aliens. _Results_ like successfully persisting in our litigation to expose **Hillary Clinton 's** lawless behavior as Secretary of State.
**And _results_ like exposing illegal Deep State actions to force Donald Trump from office! **
_But we 're only effective because more than 850,000 patriotic Americans like you are generously investing in our mission and our programs, providing us with the indispensable financial support that underwrites our lawsuits, investigations and public education work_.
W _e cannot trust corrupt institutions like the FBI or liberal, pro-Big Government media to seriously tackle public corruption_. But you _can_ trust **Judicial Watch**. We are _your_ independent Washington DC watchdog that continues to take on corrupt politicians directly and doggedly persists in using our legal system to hold our leaders - _both**Democrats and Republicans**_ - and government bureaucrats accountable under the law.
We _will_ carry forward all our current lawsuits and investigations. We _will_ fight for enforcement of our laws against illegal immigration, and the honesty of our elections. And all this work and more _will_ continue... especially if I can count on **_[your support today](https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/wta/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=52072&L=17813&F=H&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvZG9uYXRlL3RoYW5rLXlvdS0xMzUvP3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9ZGVwbG95ZXImdXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249TWF5JnV0bV90ZXJtPU5vbi1Eb25vcnMmdXRtX2NvbnRlbnQ9MjAyMDExMTgxNjU3Mzg=)_**. _Thank you_!
Sincerely,
Thomas Fitton
President
**P.S.** Others may abandon the battle to expose the **Deep State** and hold corrupt politicians accountable or walk away from fighting to shut down sanctuary policies or preserve honest elections, but **Judicial Watch** won't! Please **_[help us to fight](https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/wta/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=52072&L=17813&F=H&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvZG9uYXRlL3RoYW5rLXlvdS0xMzUvP3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9ZGVwbG95ZXImdXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249TWF5JnV0bV90ZXJtPU5vbi1Eb25vcnMmdXRtX2NvbnRlbnQ9MjAyMDExMTgxNjU3Mzg=)_** for open government and the rule of law. Thank you!
| [Contribute](https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/wta/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=52072&L=17813&F=H&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvZG9uYXRlL3RoYW5rLXlvdS0xMzUvP3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9ZGVwbG95ZXImdXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249TWF5JnV0bV90ZXJtPU5vbi1Eb25vcnMmdXRtX2NvbnRlbnQ9MjAyMDExMTgxNjU3Mzg=)

name: Christy Smith
subject: DEADLOCKED
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Christy Smith for Congress
body:
| []()
---

| | Peter --

I know we've been sending a lot of emails lately, so I'll make this quick.

Right now, this race is deadlocked. Just a few hundred votes separate me from Mike Garcia -- that's a _0.12 PERCENTAGE POINT_ difference.

Meanwhile, Republicans around the country have been racing to stop vote counts -- and questioning the legitimacy of results -- in close races like ours.

**That's why we're making it clear --_every voter must be heard in this election._**

**[Peter, can you contribute $5, or whatever you can, towards our recount fund goal of $125,000 so we can continue to fight for voters?](https://secure.christyforcongress.org/page/m/14f6be1d/29776869/83d8135/569dbd01/2575967204/VEsH/p/eyJlM3R5WldaamIyUmxmWDA9IjoiZW0yMF8yMDExMThfcmVjb3VudDEzcmVzZW5kX2luIn0%3D/?g=TRA5GMQot1BeTNifStrWt_A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/2011_email_christysmithrecount?refcode=em20_201118_recount13resend_in")** If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | [Express Donate $5](https://secure.christyforcongress.org/page/m/14f6be1d/29776869/83d8135/569dbd02/2575967204/VEsE/p/eyJlM3R5WldaamIyUmxmWDA9IjoiZW0yMF8yMDExMThfcmVjb3VudDEzcmVzZW5kX2luIn0%3D/?g=TRA5GMQot1BeTNifStrWt_A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/2011_email_christysmithrecount?refcode=em20_201118_recount13resend_in&express_lane=true&amount=5") | [Express Donate $22.44](https://secure.christyforcongress.org/page/m/14f6be1d/29776869/83d8135/569dbd03/2575967204/VEsF/p/eyJlM3R5WldaamIyUmxmWDA9IjoiZW0yMF8yMDExMThfcmVjb3VudDEzcmVzZW5kX2luIn0%3D/?g=TRA5GMQot1BeTNifStrWt_A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/2011_email_christysmithrecount?refcode=em20_201118_recount13resend_in&express_lane=true&amount=22.44")

[Express Donate $250](https://secure.christyforcongress.org/page/m/14f6be1d/29776869/83d8135/569dbd1e/2575967204/VEsA/p/eyJlM3R5WldaamIyUmxmWDA9IjoiZW0yMF8yMDExMThfcmVjb3VudDEzcmVzZW5kX2luIn0%3D/?g=TRA5GMQot1BeTNifStrWt_A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/2011_email_christysmithrecount?refcode=em20_201118_recount13resend_in&express_lane=true&amount=250") | [Donate Other Amount](https://secure.christyforcongress.org/page/m/14f6be1d/29776869/83d8135/569dbd01/2575967204/VEsB/p/eyJlM3R5WldaamIyUmxmWDA9IjoiZW0yMF8yMDExMThfcmVjb3VudDEzcmVzZW5kX2luIn0%3D/?g=TRA5GMQot1BeTNifStrWt_A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/2011_email_christysmithrecount?refcode=em20_201118_recount13resend_in")
The people of CA-25 have done their part for our democracy by turning out in incredible numbers to cast their ballots. Now it's up to us to make sure the result of this race reflects their decision. And we'll never stop fighting for their voices to be heard.

**[Can you chip in $5 or more right now to help keep us fighting, Peter?](https://secure.christyforcongress.org/page/m/14f6be1d/29776869/83d8135/569dbd01/2575967204/VEsO/p/eyJlM3R5WldaamIyUmxmWDA9IjoiZW0yMF8yMDExMThfcmVjb3VudDEzcmVzZW5kX2luIn0%3D/?g=TRA5GMQot1BeTNifStrWt_A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/2011_email_christysmithrecount?refcode=em20_201118_recount13resend_in")**

I can't thank you enough for standing with us,

Christy

[](https://secure.christyforcongress.org/page/m/14f6be1d/29776869/83d8135/569dbd01/2575967204/VEsP/p/eyJlM3R5WldaamIyUmxmWDA9IjoiZW0yMF8yMDExMThfcmVjb3VudDEzcmVzZW5kX2luIn0%3D/?g=TRA5GMQot1BeTNifStrWt_A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/2011_email_christysmithrecount?refcode=em20_201118_recount13resend_in")
Christy Smith is a community leader from CA-25 who has fought for her neighbors in Ventura and LA county on the school board and in the California state legislature. Now she needs our help to defeat Mike Garcia and flip this top pick-up House seat blue in November. Help elect a champion for our health care, our schools, and our rights. [DONATE](https://secure.christyforcongress.org/page/m/14f6be1d/29776869/83d8135/569dbd01/2575967204/VEsHBQ/p/eyJlM3R5WldaamIyUmxmWDA9IjoiZW0yMF8yMDExMThfcmVjb3VudDEzcmVzZW5kX2luIn0%3D/?g=TRA5GMQot1BeTNifStrWt_A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/2011_email_christysmithrecount?refcode=em20_201118_recount13resend_in")

name: Team Durbin
subject: What's happening in Georgia
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Dick Durbin
body:
#
Peter,
We defeated President Trump. Now, let's finish the job and end Mitch McConnell's majority.

Friend,

Did you see Darin’s message yesterday about the Democratic Party’s identity crisis on Capitol Hill?

_**Half of them are just now realizing that their far-Left agenda is the LAST thing that Americans want right now – and the other half just wants to move even farther to the left!**_

We made major gains by chipping away at their majority on election night, but they still hold the majority and we need to be ready for whatever they’re going to throw at us over the next two years.

_Will you help us make sure that Darin has what it takes to fight back?_

Friend,

**Democrats on Capitol Hill are having a full-blown identity crisis in front of the whole country.**

_Half of them are just now waking up to the fact that their ultra-progressive agenda to defund the police is what led to Republicans taking a massive chunk out of their majority on Election Day._

_Meanwhile, the other half (led by AOC and the Squad) is digging their heels in and taking their gloves off as they fight to pull their party as far Left as it can possibly go._

**How are they supposed to manage our healthcare system, our economy, and everything else they want to have complete control over if they can’t even manage their own party?**

I’m not the only one asking that question, friend.

**[Millions of Americans are asking themselves that very same question right now, and I believe that we need to answer it by putting it all on the line over the coming weeks and months to make sure that their out-of-touch agendas don’t become America’s future.](http://links.lahoodforcongress.com/u/click?_t=d5887efe66684ada97976ef2e9d70137&_m=bbb7ab8cc59d470cb31c9c2512e55372&_e=0RtOKbTVohZnaH4y3gA-FqmZorwS_7n5Ui7_-1krij_y-w402bV3l0FSABMp53MQqm8Yja5Hd3URCUFXYh5DfOBrW7MVBJJ-TJn9QhV5qsGUBfvtL7rrkU9_-OLz3luvLbgsI2h3uSaspxdIPKmqyOVpxIc5XtyWsoeHXVSOFEtbEoVUWO6jybkcp6rYFpiWO7py1j-JGu_uAfJl6-2pYVmigkEQeOUI0afzk6OeA8yZoYqDLC8CoIlejP1bfRaPd_33yw9GQI6rWGXPNzYnxcVOb1LfK0lGo6sW8O42ED5ZSPhS5v70aZGOZCUW2CNPzI6oKe0Rb8IitNVnXNf7VJUdOHdD7SwxdcOLsLO_7dwLewAX4Nd7Al_Jx0sHvtx59CHfzmtmwczHLhOOfDIu09ftILPzUzqou83BKdhEbGzCR2fJ_9XkhO4gw08k4R1HwggjtebMfNcmSNDxAobXDizWMQqU5VxUQDG1E3g72C0%3D)**

Democrats might still hold the majority, but Republicans have all the momentum in Congress, and it’s all thanks to grassroots conservatives like you who worked so hard to bring us this far.

_But I’ll be honest, friend. The next two years in Washington are going to be an uphill battle and they’re going to throw everything they have at us._

**We’re going to stand up for the American people and the American Dream every step of the way by taking on Medicare for All, taking on the Green New Deal, taking on Supreme Court packing, and every other radical proposal they have up their sleeves.**

We won’t be able to do it without you. Can I count on you to help us keep fighting hard as we move forward?
[**CHIP IN TO HELP WIN THIS UPHILL BATTLE**](http://links.lahoodforcongress.com/u/click?_t=d5887efe66684ada97976ef2e9d70137&_m=bbb7ab8cc59d470cb31c9c2512e55372&_e=0RtOKbTVohZnaH4y3gA-FqmZorwS_7n5Ui7_-1krij_y-w402bV3l0FSABMp53MQqm8Yja5Hd3URCUFXYh5DfOBrW7MVBJJ-TJn9QhV5qsGUBfvtL7rrkU9_-OLz3luvLbgsI2h3uSaspxdIPKmqyOVpxIc5XtyWsoeHXVSOFEtbEoVUWO6jybkcp6rYFpiWO7py1j-JGu_uAfJl6-2pYVmigkEQeOUI0afzk6OeA8yZoYqDLC8CoIlejP1bfRaPd_33yw9GQI6rWGXPNzYnxYJSwJQxi9I_oG47TCSjZMEyw1LkwE5LOYpQtLrCmMOpayIoEu2EZYmOIFNh_THF8FnPAyDlURo18MterlxjdRX96JcATWvRi9iwtxZFl6zeCRAm34N7P9FFoqO00kBf-mHSP4HL9lpOhB_nxqmtBtJullpZF8VvHqx1r475WuGZWB0AjK-EoQpzLPH9NaL0F9LeeJHSnc1Fg1Hqbu_RdO4%3D)

name: Abigail Spanberger
subject: a look back
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Spanberger for Congress
body:
| [ ](https://act.myngp.com/el/qyX902VezporoBgIKZxBYJ1KPSbx8hxHyRBUj37QZOI=/_QkTBvm2GarGoI0CHM5N3EanzKTesGYrEklMd2d5KrI=?refcode=BLU-SPAN-20201118-1-EM&amount=25)
---
| Peter,

I am grateful for the opportunity to continue serving Virginia's 7th district, and I thank all of you who supported our campaign and my re-election. As I return to Capitol Hill, I was reflecting on the uniqueness of this campaign season and wanted to share a few photos and a few of my favorite memories from this one-of-a-kind campaign: [](https://act.myngp.com/el/qyX902VezporoBgIKZxBYJ1KPSbx8hxHyRBUj37QZOI=/_QkTBvm2GarGoI0CHM5N3EanzKTesGYrEklMd2d5KrI=?refcode=BLU-SPAN-20201118-1-EM&amount=25) _Voting early with my family on September 18th_ [](https://act.myngp.com/el/qyX902VezporoBgIKZxBYJ1KPSbx8hxHyRBUj37QZOI=/_QkTBvm2GarGoI0CHM5N3EanzKTesGYrEklMd2d5KrI=?refcode=BLU-SPAN-20201118-1-EM&amount=25) _Hopping on to thank volunteers at one of our virtual phone banks_ [](https://act.myngp.com/el/qyX902VezporoBgIKZxBYJ1KPSbx8hxHyRBUj37QZOI=/_QkTBvm2GarGoI0CHM5N3EanzKTesGYrEklMd2d5KrI=?refcode=BLU-SPAN-20201118-1-EM&amount=25) _Attending a "Voter Registration Block Party" organized by high school students in Orange_ [](https://act.myngp.com/el/qyX902VezporoBgIKZxBYJ1KPSbx8hxHyRBUj37QZOI=/_QkTBvm2GarGoI0CHM5N3EanzKTesGYrEklMd2d5KrI=?refcode=BLU-SPAN-20201118-1-EM&amount=25) _Being surprised by friends and supporters before my debate_ [](https://act.myngp.com/el/qyX902VezporoBgIKZxBYJ1KPSbx8hxHyRBUj37QZOI=/_QkTBvm2GarGoI0CHM5N3EanzKTesGYrEklMd2d5KrI=?refcode=BLU-SPAN-20201118-1-EM&amount=25) _Joining Senator Tim Kaine to fire up volunteers heading out for contactless canvassing in Chesterfield_ [](https://act.myngp.com/el/qyX902VezporoBgIKZxBYJ1KPSbx8hxHyRBUj37QZOI=/_QkTBvm2GarGoI0CHM5N3EanzKTesGYrEklMd2d5KrI=?refcode=BLU-SPAN-20201118-1-EM&amount=25) _Attending the NAACP 's "Parade to the Polls" in Spotsylvania _ [](https://act.myngp.com/el/qyX902VezporoBgIKZxBYJ1KPSbx8hxHyRBUj37QZOI=/_QkTBvm2GarGoI0CHM5N3EanzKTesGYrEklMd2d5KrI=?refcode=BLU-SPAN-20201118-1-EM&amount=25) _Meeting a future voter in Culpeper_ [](https://act.myngp.com/el/qyX902VezporoBgIKZxBYJ1KPSbx8hxHyRBUj37QZOI=/_QkTBvm2GarGoI0CHM5N3EanzKTesGYrEklMd2d5KrI=?refcode=BLU-SPAN-20201118-1-EM&amount=25) _Greeting voters on Election Day at my alma mater, J.R. Tucker High School, in Henrico_ [](https://act.myngp.com/el/qyX902VezporoBgIKZxBYJ1KPSbx8hxHyRBUj37QZOI=/_QkTBvm2GarGoI0CHM5N3EanzKTesGYrEklMd2d5KrI=?refcode=BLU-SPAN-20201118-1-EM&amount=25) _Taking the SpanVan on tour across VA-07_ Thank you for being part of this Team Spanberger community,

_Abigail_

name: George Buck
subject: Georgia is Ground Zero
body:
Image

https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=7RSOW&m=f.wh.ZCyGrcqI4c&b=TEkLiv31ITEMVg7XBxDnTQ

Hi Peter,

They are stealing the Presidential election. Now the Left wants to steal the U.S. Senate - and we need to fight back to "Save the Senate"!

My name is Dr. George Buck, and I am a retired firefighter and U.S. Airborne Army veteran. I am writing to you on behalf of Drain the DC Swamp PAC, which has been helping good America First conservatives like you and me in Pennsylvania, Georgia, Florida, and around the country!

I have dedicated my time and efforts to fighting for the President and his agenda - and right now we need your help!

We are in the midst of the fight of our lives - a struggles whose stakes are so high, if we lose, we may well lose the Republic.

Consider this: right now, the President is trying to make sure that all the LEGAL votes are counted.

But as he fights in the courts, there is another fight in Georgia that is just as important.

As Nancy Pelosi has had control over the House, the Senate has been the death of many bad Democrat ideas- and affirmed so many of the President's excellent judges and nominees.

Put frankly, we NEED the Senate- and we MUST have control over the Senate, especially if Biden does steal the Presidency.

If worst comes to worst- control over the Senate will be all we have to stop the radical Left.

Image

https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=7RSOW&m=f.wh.ZCyGrcqI4c&b=TEkLiv31ITEMVg7XBxDnTQ

You've seen what nonsense AOC and the Squad have been pushing for the last two years.

You've seen her push to "defund the police", but that would only be the beginning, without a Republican Senate.

Bad ideas like endless entitlements, the Green New Deal, high taxes, Socialism.... that's our future, if we don't win BOTH of these races in Georgia.

Make no mistake, it really is THAT important. Heck, Chuck Schumer boasted of it- he will be spending $100 million on those races.

The Left is all in. That means we must meet their intensity.

https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=7RSOW&m=f.wh.ZCyGrcqI4c&b=TEkLiv31ITEMVg7XBxDnTQ

Image

https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=7RSOW&m=f.wh.ZCyGrcqI4c&b=TEkLiv31ITEMVg7XBxDnTQ

But it really stars Schumer, the Senate’s top Democrat, whose eight-word vow bookends the 30-second spot: “Now we take Georgia, then we change America.”

Schumer was filmed making those remarks on Saturday in the afterglow of President-elect Joe Biden’s victory. They play into longstanding GOP attacks in Georgia that Democrats are puppets of out-of-state interests who are too extreme for the state.

Scott, a potential presidential candidate who will soon chair the National Republican Senatorial Committee, said Schumer’s “change” would bring a vast overhaul to Washington if Democrats Jon Ossoff and Raphael Warnock prevail over U.S. Sens. Kelly Loeffler and David Perdue. The twin runoffs will likely determine control of the Senate.

“That’s Democrat leader Chuck Schumer. You heard him: they plan to take Georgia so they can change America. Their change: Reduce funding for police, eliminate employer-based health insurance, pack the Supreme Court, chip away at our religious freedom and gun rights.”

Image

https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=7RSOW&m=f.wh.ZCyGrcqI4c&b=TEkLiv31ITEMVg7XBxDnTQ

For years now, Drain the DC Swamp PAC has been fighting for the America First agenda. From getting out the vote for the President in Pennsylvania to electing pro-Trump conservatives in Georgia, we have put our resources toward fighting the Left- and with fantastic results!

We want to go back to Georgia to make sure we win TWO Senate races- to make sure that, if worst comes to worst, there is a check on Joe Biden's worst impulses.

We want to make sure that exactly ZERO of AOC's bad ideas ever becomes law.

We want to protect your Constitutionally protected rights, but we can't do that if Chuck Schumer gets control over the Senate!

We MUST win two of two races there. The stakes couldn't be higher. Will you help us?

https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=7RSOW&m=f.wh.ZCyGrcqI4c&b=TEkLiv31ITEMVg7XBxDnTQ

Your contribution is so crucial. Your $25, 50, 100, 250, 500, 1000 or more will send an immediate message to the Left

https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=7RSOW&m=f.wh.ZCyGrcqI4c&b=TEkLiv31ITEMVg7XBxDnTQ
- that neither Georgia, NOR America is theirs!

We have come so far with the America First agenda. We can't turn back now! Help us push forward and win in Georgia

https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=7RSOW&m=f.wh.ZCyGrcqI4c&b=TEkLiv31ITEMVg7XBxDnTQ
, for America!

Respectfully,

Image

https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=7RSOW&m=f.wh.ZCyGrcqI4c&b=WTItD61.E3brLi.I2H4b6g

George Buck Phd

Airborne Veteran and Firefighter

Conservative

P.S. Our nation is in crisis. Socialists control the House of Representatives, they want to pack the Supreme Court, and the Presidency is going through litigation and recounts. The ONLY firewall we have against all of that is the United States Senate - and that could change if we lose on January 5th in Georgia. Donate right now to help us save the Senate.

https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=7RSOW&m=f.wh.ZCyGrcqI4c&b=TEkLiv31ITEMVg7XBxDnTQ
We must elect Kelly Loeffler and David Perdue.

5 Halifax Ct
Marlton NJ 08053
USA

To unsubscribe or change subscriber options, visit:
https://www.aweber.com/z/r/?rByszEzMnLTsbKysjMxsHLRGtCwcjAzMDKyc

name: Rob Portman
subject: very important

body:
Friend, Maintaining Republican control of the Senate is critical to reining in the most radical members of the Democratic party.
And Friend, our fight is not yet over.
Control of the Senate continues to hang in the balance with two runoff races in Georgia **[so I need to know that YOU are up for the fight to keep it.](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=0018IiH_ik6_HHdemh9C-_Sm6lZwZ4a4pvnj3f8yYA0hxRLM80Z-I2b9mUjiZWTjuzbIGu05kaF4YXCfURenvakwlOA9SEUSSYRyj0nv8v84R4zOeTpBj7H8cAgp0BPxSMf_lSmP_D32YvCQnBnHDWTb3gcBdrLy4xtRWi9WMPrO-6UXA9s203a3mhk4QVSFiDM9uAYpm472CF0_m_W7GJ57gOsNfjVUqFSAnFoDAnTJHOtA-wlwjg5o6vrHrrUtWb90spWKUUhLzvVwtY-lI7UUmdQaEBwP6b6APb9Je7cg39ihG8sxso9HBsIQ9H_RCFtKHKHKERRyMIhB6FlDPbyY2J8n_rYWMWl&c=ekLu85ZvCO5VUoAaMpxlsAACzoOsa1x2YrT3TNmZcf721cQ_frYy3Q==&ch=9E-XjsB6o3-Vq-apYZfiIi9HEj-yYzOqN4vDs15AN7I2Dmy4iQZZJg==)**

Americans always have a choice: a Senate that would rubber-stamp higher taxes on middle-class families, enact job-killing regulations, and support government-run health care OR a Senate that would stand up for small business owners, middle-class families and the men and women in law enforcement.
We must continue to make one thing loud and clear that the American people are AGAINST a Schumer-controlled Senate. subject: Fund one day of discovery recount in a precinct!

body:
[ ](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/b49153ac4d1237a53a89ac0c84d83476/34533/963cab835716f117/abefe33d91cce99cc3d6b838967d376c/34533) Peter, We are fighting hard to make sure EVERY legal vote is counted in Illinois’ 14th Congressional District, and we need your help to ensure it happens.
We need staff to observe individual precincts as they are given to us during the discovery recount process, and we need attorneys to help our legal effort, and the bills are piling up quick!
At a rate of $10 per hour, our staff will spend days two-at-a-time in precincts, going through every single ballot. That means we could be looking at $180 per day PER PRECINCT, just for staff hours. Attorney fees are even more – at $200 per hour! [**Fund 1 Hour Of Recount Work**](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/b49153ac4d1237a53a89ac0c84d83476/34533/963cab835716f117/01fe61726bb4f94dc3d6b838967d376c/34533) [**Fund Half A Day Of Recount Work**](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/b49153ac4d1237a53a89ac0c84d83476/34533/963cab835716f117/f5e9b7f291f23eb9c3d6b838967d376c/34533) [**Fund 1 Full Day Of Recount Work**](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/b49153ac4d1237a53a89ac0c84d83476/34533/963cab835716f117/5662366c5c843973c3d6b838967d376c/34533) [**Fund 1 Hour Of Attorney Fees**](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/b49153ac4d1237a53a89ac0c84d83476/34533/963cab835716f117/f8bad1c6e2ac92acc3d6b838967d376c/34533) [**Add your best possible contribution**](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/b49153ac4d1237a53a89ac0c84d83476/34533/963cab835716f117/829c91b12ee6a677c3d6b838967d376c/34533) The left is desperate to win this for Lauren Underwood, and that’s why we need to fight hard to make sure every LEGAL vote is counted. We can win this, but we need your help today!
[Will you chip in $10 or more right now to help our discovery recount efforts?](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/b49153ac4d1237a53a89ac0c84d83476/34533/963cab835716f117/838a180c6427312fc3d6b838967d376c/34533)
For the win,
Team Oberweis | | [](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/b49153ac4d1237a53a89ac0c84d83476/34533/963cab835716f117/1c3cb4bc94cd4f58c3d6b838967d376c/34533)

| |
---
| Dear Peter \-- After watching last month’s Manhattan District Attorney debate, the choice is clear. **I am proudly supporting Janos Marton for this important role, and I hope you will as well today by sending a grassroots donation to his campaign. **
---
| [DONATE NOW FOR PROGRESSIVE CHANGE →](https://janosforda.us2.list-manage.com/track/click?u=275c2ec80365ed02bae607247&id=76bd117451&e=7758ed002e "DONATE NOW FOR PROGRESSIVE CHANGE →")
---
| I've fought to change our broken criminal justice system for years, from my death penalty defense work as a young lawyer to my run for Attorney General in 2018. When I took on special interests in Albany, Janos was a close ally, combating corruption during his work on the Moreland Commission. And I saw Janos’ passionate, progressive leadership shine when he led the Close Rikers campaign. If not for his tireless efforts to close one of America’s most notorious jails, Mayor Bill de Blasio may have never even considered closing it. Now, we can look forward to finally shutting its doors. **But Janos will go even further than that. ** He has a strategy and the experience to reduce jail and prison populations by over 80% and attack the root causes of crime in our city. I know and trust Janos to be an important criminal justice leader in New York, and I strongly support the changes he'll bring to our broken system. [_**Janos isn’t taking any money from real estate, law enforcement, corporate interests, or from Wall Street, just grassroots donations from individuals like you. Can you chip in now to keep his campaign for change going strong?**_](https://janosforda.us2.list-manage.com/track/click?u=275c2ec80365ed02bae607247&id=44a594ee98&e=7758ed002e)

| Thank you for your activism.

clean_body: | | | | "DONATE NOW >>" | | | Dear Peter \-- After watching last month’s Manhattan District Attorney debate, the choice is clear. I am proudly supporting Janos Marton for this important role, and I hope you will as well today by sending a grassroots donation to his campaign. | "DONATE NOW FOR PROGRESSIVE CHANGE →" | I've fought to change our broken criminal justice system for years, from my death penalty defense work as a young lawyer to my run for Attorney General in 2018. When I took on special interests in Albany, Janos was a close ally, combating corruption during his work on the Moreland Commission. And I saw Janos’ passionate, progressive leadership shine when he led the Close Rikers campaign. If not for his tireless efforts to close one of America’s most notorious jails, Mayor Bill de Blasio may have never even considered closing it. Now, we can look forward to finally shutting its doors. But Janos will go even further than that. He has a strategy and the experience to reduce jail and prison populations by over 80% and attack the root causes of crime in our city. I know and trust Janos to be an important criminal justice leader in New York, and I strongly support the changes he'll bring to our broken system. | "DONATE NOW FOR PROGRESSIVE CHANGE →" | Thank you for your activism. | | Zephyr Teachout | | | | | | | | | | | | | | "DONATE NOW TO ELECT JANOS! >>" | | PAID FOR BY JANOS MARTON FOR DISTRICT ATTORNEY Our mailing address is: Janos Marton for Manhattan District Attorney212 E 25th St Apt 12Brooklyn, NY 11226-6211 Want to change how you receive these emails? body:
There’s only a few thousand more ballots left to be counted and we need all the help we can get to finish the fight for NY-22 **ALERT: We’re Nearing the End of the Absentee Ballot Count** _With just a few thousands ballots left to count we’re still in position to win – but we can’t afford to let our guards down until every last legal ballot is counted!_ **[CHIP IN NOW>>>](http://links.claudiaforcongress.com/u/click?_t=e8d915629893476cb837806f005d02de&_m=3b358f4300b6437da3a05b9f8828db6c&_e=vpsAd5W4EzMIWIdtfeLp27LR0vuW94J1b-pO18NSOOFoIpCpcn5MUdnuKvdKxNcBHbTEQV8Ag3F-33eXeL2VkUiS-g2cRl94ag1NHYJ-pnXjo0c8Ur2nyXsxvqO4t53deA1VteDehTYxt7n697pjNm8ceIyFKOGH3U6GmFjfKzeWExs0yIVQeUf6eYsCz--firxBbvk6vdsYlX9GtGgMxfErFp3PmAgP-PBs8V4tb9-3OTFzAcdwOSPOrCNIx8nFxX3IKR5MhPfxsNrsrmXrRTLyl4a0GvCLtyszVHhoXQDZSOI_TajL6CZwnbSRcFQav_qUwmE5dBzKJOoF3FNDtQymqW1-CRasIFSZ7oJsPQQXUZRjV15Gn27CkSXCgYj3BVUsNtJSoDJWY-W_aDX0_cLou1Bw4wncUH3UCumgbd31Y-u-b1-iBv0mx6iFj2xh7jK5DtJfzgyo24sCTQ10Hqb9jwYsR8ecrJ5CJcU3Pb0%3D)** [ ](http://links.claudiaforcongress.com/u/click?_t=e8d915629893476cb837806f005d02de&_m=3b358f4300b6437da3a05b9f8828db6c&_e=vpsAd5W4EzMIWIdtfeLp27LR0vuW94J1b-pO18NSOOFoIpCpcn5MUdnuKvdKxNcBHbTEQV8Ag3F-33eXeL2VkUiS-g2cRl94ag1NHYJ-pnXjo0c8Ur2nyXsxvqO4t53deA1VteDehTYxt7n697pjNm8ceIyFKOGH3U6GmFjfKzeWExs0yIVQeUf6eYsCz--firxBbvk6vdsYlX9GtGgMxfErFp3PmAgP-PBs8V4tb9-3OTFzAcdwOSPOrCNIx8nFxX3IKR5MhPfxsNrsrmXrRfyps3zrEuvayi0_81eJq0yAc_XGeYZaR07PMaJl50glINkKe9ER8CspDZafvz0PZLh0XCIo0LdGqxndA4B643NGgDeonz2KizzvqbmxjkVnebNT3pgZX6Fgd-FjzBxg7H2bk9P0TH2odHVK7tLOwbwt4Pp-ENUvPmf3EFnStIBfQm2Xl3YtgtWqM0PnMiLN_O00LTTkVTf4ynABssgWbss%3D) Friend, For the past 15 days we’ve been fighting nonstop to defend fairness and transparency in this election.
_I’m happy to report that we’re almost at the finish line, friend._
There have been plenty of late nights and early mornings ever since Election Day – and while it hasn’t been easy, we keep pushing forward because we know that too much is on the line right now to sit on the sidelines and hope for the best.
**We wouldn’t be here without you, and on behalf of myself and our entire team, I can’t thank you enough for that.**
But the truth is, we can’t let our guards down until every last legal ballot is counted and a winner is called in this election. We only have a few thousand more ballots to go, and with an extremely narrow margin of error in this race, we need all the help we can get to close out the count. **By donating below, you are making clean_body: There’s only a few thousand more ballots left to be counted and we need all the help we can get to finish the fight for NY-22 ALERT: We’re Nearing the End of the Absentee Ballot Count With just a few thousands ballots left to count we’re still in position to win – but we can’t afford to let our guards down until every last legal ballot is counted! Friend, For the past 15 days we’ve been fighting nonstop to defend fairness and transparency in this election. I’m happy to report that we’re almost at the finish line, friend. There have been plenty of late nights and early mornings ever since Election Day – and while it hasn’t been easy, we keep pushing forward because we know that too much is on the line right now to sit on the sidelines and hope for the best. We wouldn’t be here without you, and on behalf of myself and our entire team, I can’t thank you enough for that. But the truth is, we can’t let our guards down until every last legal ballot is counted and a winner is called in this election. We only have a few thousand more ballots to go, and with an extremely narrow margin of error in this race, we need all the help we can get to close out the count. subject: Democrat Warnock Must Apologize For Disrespecting Our Military
body:
| | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/96b4ef530042/tickets-ga-gop-defend-the-majority-rally-with-vice-president-pence-for-senators-david-perdue-and-kelly-loeffler-66231?e=02cd889ad3)
---
|
---
| _**Democrat Warnock Must Apologize For Disrespecting Our Military**_
---
| **_“America, nobody can serve God and the military.”_ That’s what Democrat Rev. Raphael Warnock said in footage [uncovered](https://perduesenate.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4ebb829fcdaef555ddec2107e&id=4ee47d6559&e=02cd889ad3) from a past sermon by _Fox News_. **

Georgia, is that really the type of person we want serving in our U.S. Senate?

**Here’s what Senator David Perdue, a member of the Senate Armed Services Committee, thinks of Warnock’s disrespectful comments:**

_“I am outraged about Reverend Raphael Warnock's remarks that he made from his pulpit in his church that you 'can't serve God and the military.' As a member of the Senate Armed Services Committee, I know that the best - and I mean the very best - of America is in uniform around the world, protecting every one of us with honor and dignity. Thousands of Georgians proudly serve in our Armed Forces, and anyone who represents them in the United States Senate should treat them with dignity and honor. Warnock's conduct deserves condemnation, and his running mate Jon Ossoff's silence on this speaks volumes to his own character. I hope Ossoff will join me in urging his teammate, Warnock, to immediately apologize to those who serve our country and their families.”_

**We know what David Perdue thinks, but what about Jon Ossoff?**

In America, we don’t force our family and friends to choose between their faith and their love of country. Senators David Perdue and Kelly Loeffler stand with our servicemembers 100%.

**That's why it is so important to re-elect them both. Please, chip in[here](https://perduesenate.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4ebb829fcdaef555ddec2107e&id=6ed9a7048c&e=02cd889ad3).**

**_PLUS_ \-- Facebook has banned us from advertising. We need YOUR HELP to get our message out. Forward this message to 10 friends.**

**TOM COTTON → **

As Senator Tom Cotton [said](https://perduesenate.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4ebb829fcdaef555ddec2107e&id=023e5773f3&e=02cd889ad3), **“This is an insult to everyone who served.”** The _Washington Times_ [highlighted](https://perduesenate.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4ebb829fcdaef555ddec2107e&id=56ad0cb184&e=02cd889ad3) Senator Cotton’s calls for Warnock to resign.

**MARCO RUBIO → **

This morning, Senator Marco Rubio (R-FL) [joined](https://perduesenate.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4ebb829fcdaef555ddec2107e&id=6152b47689&e=02cd889ad3) Hugh Hewitt to discuss Warnock’s despicable comments. [Listen](https://perduesenate.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4ebb829fcdaef555ddec2107e&id=03910c8402&e=02cd889ad3) and [share](https://perduesenate.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4ebb829fcdaef555ddec2107e&id=7f63a7429b&e=02cd889ad3) the full interview.

RUBIO: _“For an enormous number of men and women in the military, God is their priority, as it should be. That said, they have a job to do, and they do it well, and they do it so that people have the freedom to worship as they please and to say, and have the freedom to speak and say the things they say.

“But I also think it’s very insightful. This is the Democratic Party. This is who they are. And even if it’s not the majority of their members, as they claim, these are the people who raise a lot of money. This is the activist base. This is the people who get featured articles in magazines and on the front cover, that have documentaries made about them. These are the stars of the Democratic Party, [they] hold these kinds of views. And they just try to hide it while they’re running for office in a state like Georgia, but then it obviously becomes apparent once they get in office.”_

HEWITT: _“Now Senator, ours is a blue star family, and I am deeply offended by this. And I have talked to our blue star family members, and they are incredulous and then shocked and then outraged. Here is the follow up. I went online this morning, it’s been out for 16 hours. I covered it last night. It is covered on Fox News, and the rest of legacy media is absolutely silent as a cemetery. Not a word. Not a quote. Not an attempt to explain.”_

**NEWT GINGRICH → **

As Newt Gingrich [said](https://perduesenate.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4ebb829fcdaef555ddec2107e&id=4879dc5562&e=02cd889ad3) on _Hannity_ , “Reverend Warnock is an extraordinarily radical candidate and, essentially, Ossoff is a product of Hollywood and Silicon Valley.”

**LINDSEY GRAHAM → **

Last night, Senator Lindsey Graham [joined](https://perduesenate.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4ebb829fcdaef555ddec2107e&id=db5cfd0d83&e=02cd889ad3) Sean Hannity to discuss the state of the race in Georgia. Click here to watch and share.

GRAHAM: _“If Georgia goes, the nation goes. Democrats are calling for people to move into Georgia for the express purpose of winning these two Senate seats. I had money sent into South Carolina, but nobody asked the people for California to move into South Carolina. Stacey Abrams is calling for people to move to Georgia to tip the balance of power in the U.S. Senate... [Democrats want] to change the Supreme Court from conservative to liberal, or do away with the Electoral College so New York and California pick judges forever, and make D.C. a state.”_
---
| [ ](https://perduesenate.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4ebb829fcdaef555ddec2107e&id=0c38c0b1f1&e=02cd889ad3 "Sen. Lindsey Graham on Hannity")
---
| **SEAN HANNITY → **

Sean [knows](https://perduesenate.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4ebb829fcdaef555ddec2107e&id=da5a9d300e&e=02cd889ad3) the stakes are high:
_“We got to do everything we can do to support Kelly Loeffler, you got the Senate runoff, David Perdue, that is January 5th. Democrats are organizing. Georgia, buckle up, you're going to have more money from outside of your state flooding in wherever you tune into anything.” _

**OSSOFF'S CALIFORNIA SUPPORTERS MOCK GEORGIA → **

Yesterday, a TikTok of a Californian [mocking](https://perduesenate.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4ebb829fcdaef555ddec2107e&id=09170e4146&e=02cd889ad3) Georgians while phone banking for Jon Ossoff and Raphael Warnock went viral. It's ridiculous and shows exactly how the coastal liberal elites feel about Georgians.

**Watch and[share](https://perduesenate.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4ebb829fcdaef555ddec2107e&id=2545031a92&e=02cd889ad3) the new video below so that Georgians will know where they stand in the eyes of Ossoff supporters. **
_Click[HERE](https://perduesenate.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4ebb829fcdaef555ddec2107e&id=5a97d0ad24&e=02cd889ad3) to share on Facebook.
Click [HERE](https://perduesenate.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4ebb829fcdaef555ddec2107e&id=034b333885&e=02cd889ad3) to retweet. _
---
| [ ](https://perduesenate.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4ebb829fcdaef555ddec2107e&id=3fef9ddb17&e=02cd889ad3)
---
| **OSSOFF & COMMUNIST CHINA → **

Yesterday, _Fox News at Night with Shannon Bream_ [highlighted](https://perduesenate.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4ebb829fcdaef555ddec2107e&id=29c7d7d3c2&e=02cd889ad3) Jon Ossoff’s secretive connections with the Communist Party in China.

_“Perdue says Ossoff has financial ties to the Chinese Communist government through his production company and tried to hide the connection in public disclosure forms claiming this would prevent him from holding China accountable for their role in the spread of COVID-19.”_

Click [here](https://perduesenate.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4ebb829fcdaef555ddec2107e&id=753af68a66&e=02cd889ad3) or below to watch the segment.
